[2021-09-26 17:08] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Depends on what you consider as "very basic"

When I first started playing Prismata, I was stuck on some of the combat missions (singleplayer puzzles). Solving them involved having a realization that I would now consider a "very basic" element of tactics. But without playing the mission who knows how long it would've taken me to realize it on my own just from playing games (unless someone pointed it out ofc)
[2021-09-26 17:10] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So there's defo valuable stuff in there that can accelerate your skill level progression
[2021-09-26 17:11] actualg (Actual G): separate unrelated topic: I wish there were more units that promoted “breachable” strategies somehow; one way of doing this might be a “Backline” keyword where your opponent must attack these after a breach (but they pick which ones)
[2021-09-26 17:12] actualg (Actual G): breachability seems like an interesting but underdeveloped aspect of the game
[2021-09-26 17:13] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I'm curious how everyone feels about BP (breachproof)

I feel like you can fairly frequently run into sets that are "definitely BP" and some where you have to make an interesting decision between going BP or not (or even going semi-BP)
[2021-09-26 17:13] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): So idk I feel like BP strategies are relevant fairly frequently
[2021-09-26 17:14] actualg (Actual G): i’ve never seen anyone go BP
[2021-09-26 17:14] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): I'd say play more, but then "ded gaem" :c
[2021-09-26 17:14] actualg (Actual G): very rarely gauss cannon health becomes relevant but that’s about it
[2021-09-26 17:15] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): Lemme browse my replays
